title: selliguea coriacea
intro: Selliguea coriacea, also known as the umbrella fern, is a plant species belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Selliguea coriacea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
